TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-swing_taugadhu

S.FORM: uh sabaw makanaelre.
S.TRANSL: 哈囉 大家好。
Hello everybody.

S.FORM: kay apelaelaane li kay sivale yaie amani kay yaie talaisi ta ka Ngudradrekay.
S.TRANSL: 我要講一個有關我們魯凱鞦韆的事情。
I am to talk about our swing of Rukai.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格
第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: la kamani kuini kiamatikai turamuru yakay kikay lu pelaela kikay.
S.TRANSL: 所以(鞦韆)常常被談起，有人會談到這個。
So (the swing) is often talked about, there would be (people) mention this

S.FORM: u talaisi makaelaela ku taiya.
S.TRANSL: 鞦韆的說法都不一樣。
The ways to say swing are different.

S.FORM: si kikay talaisi ta kay yaiye.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們的鞦韆呢，
And our swing

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: yakay kay talaisi ta ka Ngudradrekay.
S.TRANSL: 魯凱族有鞦韆。
There are swings of Rukai.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: yakay kay talaisi ta ki Ngubabuculu.
S.TRANSL: 排灣族有鞦韆。
There are swing of Paiwan.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: ai makaela.
S.TRANSL: 但 (他們)不一樣。
But (they) are different.

S.FORM: kay yaie talaisi ki yaie Ngubabuculu lu iya yaie tuma amia.
S.TRANSL: 排灣的鞦韆會叫做Tuma。
The swing of Paiwan would name tuma.

S.FORM: la kikay talaisi lu iya kay lu Ngudradrekayane.
S.TRANSL: 然後這鞦韆在魯凱會叫做talasi。
Then this swing in Rukai would name talasi.

S.FORM: a tuma lu iya yaie kay Ngubabucululuane kikay tuma ki Ngubabuculu yaie.
S.TRANSL: 那個排灣的鞦韆，排灣的鞦韆叫做tuma。
The swing in Paiwan, (We) say the swing of Paiwan tuma.

S.FORM: lu karudrarudrange ku talialalai arakay tulreveke patuapapala kuini ki satulrevekeane kikay tuma lu iya kay ai kay talaisi ta ka Ngudradrekay yakay kudra nidarepanekuvai.
S.TRANSL: 魯凱族的鞦韆是有意義的。
Rukai’s swing is meaningful.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: kai tungiatalaisi cacapange.
S.TRANSL: 鞦韆不能自己隨便盪。
Swing can not be swung by yourself at will.

S.FORM: lu e lu ka tatu lrisisisiane tangielribalribalritane yaie amani ku tangitalailaisiane kay ki yaie kay lamaliali la kay lu makatuthalridi kay sauvalay ngitalaisi kay lamaliali ku ku makapituane.
S.TRANSL: 當豐收的時候，豐年祭的時候，男人做任務，女人盪鞦韆，要花費七天。
During harvest festival, when harvest, man will do their mission, and women swing for seven days.

S.FORM: un kikay talaisi anikakucingalre lu iyaane.
S.TRANSL: 這個鞦韆，為什麼(我們說)(它)這麼重要呢?
The swing, why (we) would say (it) important?

S.FORM: kikay ye lu muangitalaisi kay lamaliali yaie yakay kudra lrekeme kudra ki talaisi amia.
S.TRANSL: 這些女孩去盪鞦韆之後，鞦韆變的有生命。
After these girls go swinging, there are spirits in swings.

S.FORM: ala iya si inilringa kay takidremedremeane su ka ababai lu ngitalaisi su na la yaie kikay lrikeme kay ki talaisi na lay yaie pelaela ku takidremedremeane su amia kuni takidremedremeane su amani kudra mualecege amia.
S.TRANSL: 尤其當那個(女孩子)在盪鞦韆的時候呢，鞦韆的靈氣會告訴妳的心，叫妳的心要正直。
Especially when (the girl) is swinging, the spirit of the swing will tell you heart and ask your heart to be decent.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著屬格
第二人稱單數.附著屬格
第二人稱單數.附著屬格
第二人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kudra lu ngitalai lu e ngitalaisiane ka ababay yaie kaidu mua wamua ngukelray la e.
S.TRANSL: 當那個女孩子在盪鞦韆的時候，(她)不能只是吊掛在那兒。
When the girl is swinging, (she) can’t just hang there.

S.FORM: un ngitalailasi yakay kudra kakudhane.
S.TRANSL: 盪鞦韆的方式是有意義的。
There is meaning in swinging method.

S.FORM: lu ngitalaisiane na la yaie m yakay kudra wapilu madu yakay kudra un tangibalre madu.
S.TRANSL: 盪鞦韆的時候需要屈膝和變換角度。
There are bending knees and changing angle needed when (one) swings.

S.FORM: kikay yaie mathalrilri kuini ababay amia yaie lu ngitalaisi yaie mualecege.
S.TRANSL: 盪鞦韆盪得很漂亮的女生，是善良的。
Girls who swing beautifully are decent.

S.FORM: kuini ngiakalrimadumadu sivavalrau yaie taingeane kuini kidremedreme kuini ki ali su kai mualecege.
S.TRANSL: 這樣的錯誤代表了你的女性朋友不是善良的。
This mistake means that your female friend is not decent.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: amamama sivavalrau ngiakalrimadumadumadu la iya.
S.TRANSL: 糾纏是自己的錯誤。
The tangling is a mistake of oneself.

S.FORM: la kamani kay yaie lu ka lavavalake ana kay ababay nalai kiathiathiathingaleng angitalailaisi.
S.TRANSL: 女孩子從小就要開始學習盪鞦韆。
Girls needs to learn how to swinging by herself since childhood.

S.FORM: lu kela kuini tangingitalailaisiane.
S.TRANSL: 當到了自己盪鞦韆日到的時候。
When the day of self-swinging comes.

S.FORM: latautau ku tarudraudraunge buala dredrela kay ki yacengecenge.
S.TRANSL: 當到了女孩子自己盪鞦韆日到的時候老人家會叫年輕人來看。
When the day of (girls) self-swinging comes, old citizens will ask yang citizens come to watch.

S.FORM: la iya si la kela kuini pinau cekelange langiragelane makanaelre ku laaliali si.
S.TRANSL: 所有(女孩)朋友會穿傳統服裝到部落來。
All (girl’s) friends will dress in traditional clothes and come to the tribe.

S.FORM: adravane ku lamalalala.
S.TRANSL: 男孩也會(穿著傳統服飾)。
Boys will also (dress in traditional clothes).

S.FORM: lu ngitalaisi kikay laabaiay la maubalribalrithi.
S.TRANSL: 這些女孩將輪流盪鞦韆。
These girls will take turns to swing.

S.FORM: la kuini amia aku un la dredredrele kikay tarudraudraunge si la thingale la kudra mualecege lakalrigilri ngibalre lakalrigilri pinu nalai.
S.TRANSL: 我說那些老人家知道；他們在看並從你姿勢翻轉和勾腳得好不好就知道你優不優秀。
I say these old.citizen knows; they are watching and they can tell whether you are good or not by how well you change angle and bend your knees.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: anamua su upapalange laiya.
S.TRANSL: 你去追求(她)吧!
You go pursuit (her)!

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: amia un lu ngitalaisi kay lamaliali lungiragelane la kai paucilricilri ku sagniragerane.
S.TRANSL: 當穿著傳統服飾的女士們盪鞦韆的時候，頭飾不能弄掉下來。
When swinging, the women wear traditional clothes and can not let the headwear fall.

S.FORM: um kudra lu paucilri kay la taitharare ini un la sagniragerane yaie taiengeaene ka yakay kudra akikelaane ku lisi amia.
S.TRANSL: 如果頭飾或傳統服飾掉下來，我們也說有厄運會來。
If the headwear or traditional wear fall, we also say bad lock also comes.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: un la kikay yaie ababay kikay talaisi yaie luka ababay ngiatalaisi.
S.TRANSL: 這個盪鞦韆，只有女孩子自己才能盪鞦韆。
Swing, only girls swung by themselves.

S.FORM: kai ngitalailaisi ku sauvalay.
S.TRANSL: 男生不能盪。
Male can not swing.

S.FORM: um mua kay ki sakialibake kay ki un ababay.
S.TRANSL: (這)表示對女生的疼愛。
(This) represents the love for females.

S.FORM: manemane su muakicacaicaicairi ki ababay ka sauvalay laisi.
S.TRANSL: 男生,你在攪和女生什麼？
Males, what are you messing around the females?

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: la pelaela kay ki sauvalay irarenge su lakasane uh lripualrasu lakasane.
S.TRANSL: 告訴男生說你只要搖和抓住就好了。
Tell the boys you only need to sway and catch.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: un ala iya si ngitalaisi su mia ki ababay iavikicane su amia.
S.TRANSL: 如果你像女生一樣盪鞦韆，你就會像娘娘腔。
If you swing like girls do, you will be like sissy.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kuni aviki un av av avikicane kai su limaka pana nga kai su limaka alra nga ku kange.
S.TRANSL: (這個意思就是)你沒有辦法打到獵物，你也沒辦法抓到魚。
(This means) you are unable to catch preys and you can not catch fish.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kai su itulru lukaungu su imia su ki ababay karalruingi kaipaduru kualri kaipaduru ku vai amia.
S.TRANSL: (你會)無法工作，你像女孩子一樣軟綿綿、(你會)無力疲憊(而且)(你)又不能曬太陽。
(You will) not be able to work, and you will be soft like girls, and (you) have no strength and (you) can not (work) under sun.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: la kamani ku kai yaie un ka ngitalailaisi kay ki sauvalai adravane yaie kudra lu paramulu sudalru kikay sudalru kikay ki talaisi yaie.
S.TRANSL: 所以呢 男生不可以盪鞦韆，(他)不管如何都不能特別靠近鞦韆。
Therefore, males can not swing, and (he) can not get especially close to swings no matter what

S.FORM: adavane yaie kai su yapikarudra nga mia su ka ababay.
S.TRANSL: 無論如何，你會像女生，你不想結婚。
No matter what, you will be like females, and you do not want to get married.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: imia su kau vikicane un la iya.
S.TRANSL: 你會像個娘娘腔。
You will be like a sissy.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: la kalrikilri turamuru kikay tarudraudraunge nalayaie.
S.TRANSL: 老人家非常聰明。
Old people are very smart.

S.FORM: lrimaka pipipitulane huozheshi un lrimaka vauvalrulane kudra lungitalaisi si lungilribate nga kuini nalai kaidu ngiatalailaisi laiya.
S.TRANSL: (我們)鞦韆只盪七天或八天;那些日子過了(我們)就不能盪鞦韆。
(We) only swing for seven or eight days; those days passed, (we) can’t swing.

S.FORM: pelaela kay ki lavavalake lu ka maungu kaidu ngitalailaisi.
S.TRANSL: (我們)一直跟小孩子說晚上不能盪鞦韆。
(We) keeps telling children that they can not swing at night.

S.FORM: lu ngitalaisi su yaie yakay kudra pangepange amia.
S.TRANSL: 他們說有鬼當你盪鞦韆時。
They said there is a ghost when you swing.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kuini pang pangepange yaie tusuasupate ka tusupate si ka ala iya si ngitalaisi su lu maugnu yarararui musuane paliugu kavay ki lregelrege lay kaulrau su amia si.
S.TRANSL: 如果在晚上盪鞦韆，會有pangepange的四支手把你推到山的另一頭，然後你就不見了。
If you swing at night, there will be four hands of pangepange push you beyond the mountain, and then you will be gone.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.自由斜格
第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: lu kidredremeane taingeange ka sabulruane kay ki lavavalake.
S.TRANSL: (我)想一想，這是一件教導孩子的事情。
(I) think about it, this is a thing to teach children.

S.FORM: la kuini amia aku ka talaisi ta ka sane lu ka kalalrisiane.
S.TRANSL: 所以，我說呢，鞦韆只有豐年祭才能盪。
So, I said that swing can only take place at Harvest Festival.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格
第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格

S.FORM: yarubu sanaka ababababay si.
S.TRANSL: (我們)集合所有女生。
(We) gather every girl.

S.FORM: kikay Ngubabuculu yaie kuini tuma lini yaie kay ngiatalailaisi kuini marudrarudrange patuapapala tuleveke si la cegecege pikay kudra ki kalatadrange.
S.TRANSL: 鞦韆在排灣族來說，他們的鞦韆是當結婚時隨著聘禮或嫁妝立在家中的庭院然後(他們才)盪。
As far as Paiwan is concerned, their swing is erected with wedding gifts in the yard when getting married and being swung by them.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sanai iya nga ta yaie Ngudradrekayane ai lu karudrarudrang ta ka Ngudradrekay kadrua kay ki paluludane kay ki talaisi.
S.TRANSL: 當我們提到魯凱族，鞦韆在我們結婚時沒有意義。
When we talked about Rukai, there is no meaning for swing (when) we get married.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格
第一人稱複數(包含).附著屬格

S.FORM: yakay kikay lu karudrarudrange ku Ngudradrekay yakay ku talaisi amia nipamamaane kuini.
S.TRANSL: 有人說魯凱族結婚時有鞦韆是弄錯了。
(People) say there are swings in Rukai wedding get it wrong.

S.FORM: lu luka Mubabuculu si kitulrevelrevege yakay ku tiyuma.
S.TRANSL: 只有當排灣族人訂婚時，才會有鞦韆。
Only when Paiwan is engaging, there is a swing.

S.FORM: kuini tiyuma mararamau ki talaisi ka nidarepeane kay talaisi ki Ngudradrekay sa ka nadruma palraugu pi kay ki ai kadrua nga ku angatu ku paleta.
S.TRANSL: (現在)已沒有這種paleta樹。
(Now)there is no this paleta tree.

S.FORM: la kamani nga kay arakay kay palebale paraisi kunatengatengane nga ku naduma yakay kudra maadrau ki angatu kudra tapikaykayane madu e paraisi kay ki talaisi.
S.TRANSL: 古時候真正的來說，有那大樹來放置和綁這鞦韆。
The ancient time for real, there are that big trees for putting and tie this swing.

S.FORM: kikay tiyuma nidarebane wadulru madu bulri wadulru madu ilililuku.
S.TRANSL: 這鞦韆可以抬者走也能帶著.
This swing can be lifted and carried.

S.FORM: e la kamani kudra kakucingalre kay ki talaisi.
S.TRANSL: 然後就是這鞦韆很重要。
Then it is exactly that this swing is important.

S.FORM: samaka lrualrualrumayane kay ki lamaliali amia sakiliguligu sakithingathingaleane kudra taka ababayane su ala iya si kai su ala iya si kai su ngitalaisi la ngilisiane.
S.TRANSL: 你不知道盪鞦韆的方式是不好的。
It is bad that you do not know the manner of swing.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著屬格
第二人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: balase su.
S.TRANSL: 妳是個男人婆。
You are tomboy.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kuini balase yaie mia su ka sauvalay.
S.TRANSL: 這個男人婆，妳就像男生。
The tomboy, you are like a man.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: satumanane mua kavay miakau balase kai lri thingale sirapale ki daane kai lri thingale kaungu kay ki aungane ki laababay amia.
S.TRANSL: 你幹嘛娶個男人婆不知道照顧家裡(也)不知道女人的工作。
Why do you marry a tom boy who does not know (how to) take care of family (and) does not know the women’s work.

S.FORM: la kamani kudra kisamulamula si turamuru tuadrau kay ki XtalialalaiX kay ki talaisi.
S.TRANSL: 我們很努力然後重視這個鞦韆。
We make effort very much and emphasis this swing.
